variants.title: HiFi Filter SAC 065002 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAC 065002 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAC 065002 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AH19232 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAC 065002
variants.description: With over 1,500 different air filtration products, from clamps to air housings to advanced air filters, Fleetguard® provides peace of mind for your air filtration needs. Our Fleetguard® AH19232 air housing is part of the heavy-duty air filtration line, covering your sophisticated air intake system requirements.
